testcase.name: test_image_old_a_binding_cannot_revive_after_persisted_a_b_a
testcase.failure: tests/tools/test_provider_boundary_adversarial.py:272: in test_image_old_a_binding_cannot_revive_after_persisted_a_b_a assert provider_io == [] E AssertionError: assert [{'_runtime_b...gpt-image-2'}] == [] E E Left contains one more item: {'_runtime_binding': ImageGenRequestBinding(provider='codex', model='gpt-image-2'), 'model': 'gpt-image-2'} E Use -v to get more diff

testcase.name: test_vision_old_a_binding_cannot_revive_after_persisted_a_b_a
testcase.failure: tests/tools/test_provider_boundary_adversarial.py:864: in test_vision_old_a_binding_cannot_revive_after_persisted_a_b_a assert provider_io == [] E AssertionError: assert [{'max_tokens...': True, ...}] == [] E E Left contains one more item: {'max_tokens': 2000, 'messages': [{'content': [{'text': 'reject revived A binding', 'type': 'text'}, {'image_url': {'u...base64,iVBORw0KGgphYmE='}, 'type': 'image_url'}], 'role': 'user'}], 'model': 'qwen3-vl-plus', 'no_fallback': True, ...} E Use -v to get more diff
